code.description: Code review only: inspect provided files, diffs, or paths and return review conclusions without editing.
code.instructions: Review code or code changes only. Do not edit, write, patch, format, commit, or otherwise mutate files. Use the enabled read-only tools for inspection. Focus on correctness, regressions, security, concurrency, API contracts, edge cases, maintainability, and missing tests.

plan.description: High-level plan review with multiple expert lenses; output a decisive conclusion.
plan.instructions: Review the proposal, design, architecture, or product plan through multiple expert lenses: engineering lead, product owner, security, QA, operations, and developer experience. Do not implement. Identify fatal flaws, trade-offs, missing constraints, sequencing risks, and the smallest changes that would make the plan safer.

challenge.description: Adversarial plan review: pressure-test assumptions, boundaries, dependencies, and terminology.
challenge.instructions: Challenge the plan as an adversarial design reviewer. Do not ask a sequence of live interview questions; produce a one-shot review conclusion. Pressure-test terminology, hidden dependencies, reversibility, edge cases, failure modes, migration paths, ownership boundaries, and what evidence would invalidate the plan.
